scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run upload && npm run restart
scripts.deploy:docs: npm run build:docs && npm run upload
scripts.deploy:image: npm run build:image && npm run upload && npm run restart
scripts.build: npm run build:image && npm run build:docs
scripts.build:image: cd server/image && docker compose build && docker save epos-web:latest > epos-web.tar
scripts.restart: ssh admin@epos.dev "cd /server/image && docker load < epos-web.tar && docker compose up -d"
